title: Enkeltført
description: AI-native accounting platform for Norwegian sole proprietorships. Automates bookkeeping with AI at the core.
longDescription: AI-native accounting for Norwegian enkeltpersonforetak. Built around AI agents that classify transactions, draft entries, and surface insights — bookkeeping is automated, not assisted.
highlights: AI agents at the core of bookkeeping
Built for Norwegian sole proprietorships
Modern Bun + TypeScript stack

title: Partichat
description: Featured in Kode24 - A multi-party political Q&A chat providing neutral, side-by-side answers from Norwegian political parties based on their official programs.
longDescription: Featured in Kode24, Norway's biggest developer news publication. An advanced political Q&A application that allows users to select multiple Norwegian political parties and get grounded answers based strictly on official party programs. Features RAG-powered responses with pgvector similarity search, citation tracking with page numbers, streaming responses, and multi-party comparison summaries. All responses are in Norwegian Bokmål and strictly grounded in official party program documents.
highlights: Featured in Kode24 - Norway's biggest developer news publication
RAG-powered answers with pgvector similarity search
Multi-party comparison with transparent citations
Streaming responses for real-time answer generation
PDF text extraction with chunking for optimal retrieval
Norwegian Bokmål responses grounded in party programs

title: henteplan.no
description: Open API for Norwegian waste collection schedules — 13 providers, 265+ municipalities, with a self-healing Claude Code CI pipeline that repairs scrapers automatically.
longDescription: Aggregates waste-collection schedules across 13 providers and 265+ Norwegian municipalities into a single open API. The CI pipeline uses Claude Code to detect and repair broken scrapers without human intervention.
highlights: 13 providers, 265+ municipalities
Self-healing scraper CI with Claude Code
Open API for civic-tech use

title: sambu
description: Widget-based dashboard for Norwegian shared housing (kollektiv).
longDescription: A widget-based dashboard tailored for kollektiv life — chores, expenses, and shared logistics in one place.
highlights: Widget-based dashboard
Designed for shared housing

title: Voice Cloner
description: Clone any voice through three input modes: URL (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram), file upload, or microphone recording using advanced AI voice synthesis.
longDescription: An advanced voice cloning application that supports multiple input methods. Clone voices from social media URLs (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram), upload audio files directly, or record through your microphone. Uses Dia TTS technology for high-quality voice synthesis with real-time processing and cloud deployment capabilities.
highlights: Three input modes: URL, file upload, microphone
Support for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram URLs
Real-time voice cloning with Dia TTS
Responsive web interface built with HTMX
Docker deployment ready for cloud (Google Cloud Run)

title: Samfundet Medlemskort
description: Create, crop, and print membership card photos with exact dimensions. Upload a photo, crop to the required ratio, and export a ready‑to‑print A4 sheet or PDF.
longDescription: A specialized tool for creating membership card photos with precise 25mm × 30mm dimensions. Features drag & drop upload, enforced 2.5:3 crop ratio, live print preview with cutting guidelines, and one-click PDF export.
highlights: Exact sizing: 25mm × 30mm per photo on A4
Drag & drop upload with enforced crop ratio
Live print preview with precise mm sizing
One-click PDF export functionality
Accessible, responsive UI with light/dark theme
